text: Would you live without internet for 3 years (no WiFi, no data, no access) for $300,000?
How many consecutive days would you go without showering (public interactions required) for $5,000 per day?
Would you spend 2 years on a deserted island (survival skills required, everyone thinks you're dead) for $10 million?
Would you delete all social media and never create new accounts for $100,000?
Would you eat only rice and beans for 1 year (no other food, no cheat days) for $500,000?
Would you live in Detroit for 5 years (can't leave except for work/emergencies) for $1 million?
Would you give up all caffeine forever (coffee, tea, energy drinks, soda) for $75,000?
How many consecutive days could you stay awake (medical supervision, no sleeping) for $25,000 per day?
Would you serve 6 months in county jail (general population, real inmates) for $750,000?
Would you shave your head completely bald (head, eyebrows, lashes) for $15,000?
Would you give up listening to music for 10 years (no radio, no concerts, nothing) for $1 million?
Would you wear the same unwashed outfit daily for 6 months (same clothes, wash once a week) for $50,000?
Would you never use a smartphone again (flip phone only) for $500,000?
Would you work at McDonald's for 3 years (can't quit, full-time) for $2 million after?
Would you live in complete darkness for 45 days (no light, medical supervision) for $400,000?
Would you move to North Dakota for 3 years (mandatory residency) for $600,000?
Would you give up all visual entertainment (TV, movies, YouTube, Netflix) for 5 years for $500,000?
Would you switch careers to something you hate for 5 years (can't quit) for $3 million?
Would you get a forehead tattoo of a corporate logo (removable after 5 years) for $300,000 per year?
Would you never eat your top 3 favorite foods again for $150,000?
Would you take only cold showers for 2 years (no warm water ever) for $80,000?
Would you become completely nocturnal for 3 years (sleep during day, awake at night only) for $300,000?
Would you live in a 8x8 foot room for 1 year (bed, toilet, sink only) for $400,000?
Would you become completely sober (no alcohol, no drugs, no smoking) forever for $100,000?
Would you wear a shock collar that zaps you randomly (3-5 times daily) for $75,000 per month?
Would you eat a cricket/grasshopper smoothie every morning for a year for $250,000?
Would you cut off contact with your best friend for 5 years (can't explain why) for $1 million?
Would you live without any climate control (no AC, no heat) for 2 years for $200,000?
Would you run a 5K every single day for a year (no rest days) for $500,000?
Would you fake your death and assume a new identity (can never contact anyone from old life) for $20 million?
